description_long: This is a wireless video game controller with a vibrant red surface featuring a prominent Mario character graphic and a background of subtle Mario-themed icons. The controller has two black analog sticks, a blue D-pad, and several black buttons, including shoulder triggers and bumpers on the top edge. The central area displays a white circular button with a red 'M' logo, reinforcing the Mario branding. The underside and sides of the controller are matte black, providing a visual contrast and ergonomic grip. A USB port is visible on the top edge, indicating charging or wired connectivity. The overall design is playful and ergonomic, tailored for comfortable handheld use during gaming sessions.
description: A red Mario-themed wireless video game controller with black grips, analog sticks, and a blue D-pad, featuring a prominent Mario graphic and a USB port.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Mario graphic, all main buttons, analog sticks, and the central 'M' button.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the ergonomic grip, Mario graphic, and the raised profile of the analog sticks and buttons.
description_view_2: Top view displaying the shoulder triggers, bumpers, and the USB port for charging or connectivity.
description_view_3: Angled view from the opposite side, emphasizing the curvature of the controller and the arrangement of the buttons and sticks.
attribute_control_interface: physical buttons, analog sticks, D-pad, shoulder triggers
